TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_hlaqiy, title = hlaqiy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/hlaqiy} }

S.FORM: == hlaqiy == nyux t'aring mshlaqi la ru pkhzyaq kayal nya' uzi la.
== hlaqiy == nyux t'aring mshlaqi la ru pkhzyaq kayal nya' uzi la.
S.PHON: == ħlaqij == njux tʔariŋ ms~ɕħlaqi la ru pkħzjaq kajal njaʔ uzi la.
